name: @flight-academy/api-assets
description: Dev-only Bun workspace for apps/api: provides the Tailwind v4 CLI (compiles styles/app.css into static/app.css at build time), the vendored MASH JS dependencies (HTMX 2.x + extensions, Alpine.js 3.x CSP-safe build), and IBM Plex Sans + Mono woff2 typography (Latin + Latin Extended subsets) which `build.rs` copies from node_modules into static/{vendor,fonts}/. None of these reach the production runtime — they exist only so the Rust binary can serve their distributed bundles + fonts to browsers (ADR-020 §O / §F). Alpine is pinned to `@alpinejs/csp` deliberately — the CSP-safe build drops `new Function()` so strict CSP needs neither `'unsafe-inline'` nor `'unsafe-eval'`. Trade-off: `x-data` etc. accept registered component names, not inline JS expressions.
